title: Qiyshiy #7029
definition:
Kishi = "bow of Jehovah"

 1) a Merarite Levite, father or ancestor of Ethan the minstrel in the
    time of David
nasbUsage:
Definition: Kishi = "bow of Jehovah"

 1) a Merarite Levite, father or ancestor of Ethan the minstrel in the
    time of David

    NASB:  a Levite, the same as 6984
